title: URAファイナルズ準決勝にむけて

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The semifinals are upon us! The competition is so
fierce, I can feel the pressure all the way from
here.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
choice_data_list: I believe she's going to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale... At long last, the semifinals are
about to begin!
